name: Amortization of Goodwill and Intangibles

eligibility.description: Applies to intangible assets acquired in connection with the conduct of a trade or business; excludes most self-created intangibles.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Provides a ratable deduction over 15 years for the cost of acquired intangible assets like goodwill, customer lists, and patents.
